policy_statement: Fisheries adaptation strategy: strengthen capacity of fisheries authorities for research/monitoring/enforcement; support artisanal fishing communities with training, gear and alternative livelihoods; establish monitoring/reporting/verification and adaptive management; support research on climate pressures; identify/map/protect valuable fisheries areas including marine protected areas; reduce external stressors via regulatory measures; integrate fisheries into national adaptation and food security policies; establish early warning and information/communication networks; and regulate fishing to prevent overexploitation.

policy_statement: Waste management adaptation/mitigation strategy: strengthen community and institutional capacity for integrated waste management; develop an integrated waste management strategy prioritizing waste prevention and low-GHG technologies compatible with methane capture for electricity; promote PPP financing for waste infrastructure; implement composting to convert urban waste into inputs for agriculture; and develop landfills for major cities including methane recovery and power generation using CDM and NAMAs.
